message:
fix(tx): correct resume priority ordering and use HashSet-based step classification

Fix resume_terminal_outcome to check Failed before RolledBack, preventing
a rolled-back TX with failed steps from being incorrectly reported as
RolledBack instead of Failed.

Rewrite ResumeContext::from_ledger to use HashSet-based classification:
completed = Success outcomes only (was including all non-failed), remaining
computed by excluding completed+failed+compensated from plan steps. Sort
all step ID vectors for deterministic output. Add resume_paused_execution
test verifying paused TX stays Pending instead of being marked Committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
